Petition To Compel Sale Of Residence And Distribution Of Proceeds, To Remove Co-Trustee Michele S. Fung, And To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Penning appeared via zoom for Gail Yui. (petitioner).
Thomas Wilson appeared via zoom for Michelle Fung (respondent).

Mr. Penning stated that parties have met and conferred, and the possibility of filing a dismissal of the petition. The Court offered a Pro Bono Mediation if needed. The matter is continued to November 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
